entities.description: Region where peanut is planted

entities.description: Region where peanut is planted

entities.description: Region where peanut is planted

entities.description: A product derived from peanut

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A product derived from peanut

entities.name: TETRAPLOIDY
entities.description: The state of having four sets of chromosomes, specifically allotetraploidy in peanut

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the DNA sequence of the A. hypogaea genome

entities.name: ARACHIS DURANENSIS
entities.description: A diploid relative of cultivated peanut used for genomic comparison

entities.name: ARACHIS IPAENSIS
entities.description: A diploid relative of cultivated peanut used for genomic comparison

entities.name: A-SUBGENOME GENES
entities.description: Genes located on the A-subgenome of A. hypogaea, characterized by more disruption and loss

entities.name: B-SUBGENOME GENES
entities.description: Genes located on the B-subgenome of A. hypogaea, resembling the ancestral state

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION
entities.description: The process by which information from a gene is used in the synthesis of a functional gene product

entities.name: SEED DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological stage of plant growth where seeds are formed

entities.name: GENOMIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of the genome to identify genes and architecture

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of the transcriptome to identify gene expression patterns

entities.name: OIL METABOLISM-RELATED GENES
entities.description: Genes involved in the metabolism and biosynthesis of oil

entities.name: DESICCATION
entities.description: The state of extreme dryness during seed development

entities.name: LIPID BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The process of creating lipids in peanut seeds

entities.name: GENOME ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The structural organization of the peanut genome

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic traits of peanut
